message:
feat(http): add Http1ListenerStats diagnostic counters for accept-path observability

Introduce low-overhead atomic counters on the HTTP/1.1 listener to
enable diagnosing accept-path stalls and connection management issues
without requiring external instrumentation.

- Add hashbrown 0.15 dependency for reactor HashMap usage
- Add Http1ListenerStats with AtomicU64 counters: accepted_total,
  transient_accept_errors_total, spawn_failures_total, last_accept_at_ms
- Add Http1ListenerStatsSnapshot for point-in-time immutable copies
- Integrate stats recording into accept loop: record_accepted on
  successful accept, record_transient_accept_error on transient errors,
  record_spawn_failure when connection task spawn fails
- Expose stats_handle() method returning Arc<Http1ListenerStats> for
  external monitoring consumers
- Use listener_diag_now_ms() helper for Unix timestamp tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -190,6 +190,8 @@ hmac = "0.12"
 rdkafka = { version = "0.39", default-features = false, optional = true }
 # Systematic concurrency testing for scheduler (loom-tests feature)
 loom = { version = "0.7", optional = true }
+# Reactor backends use HashMap on multiple platforms.
+hashbrown = "0.15"
 # Lightweight async helpers used by web handler adapter shims.
 futures-lite = "2.6"
 # Optional gzip/deflate compression via pure-Rust miniz_oxide backend.
